name: Push-Up
instructions: Start in a high plank position with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width, arms straight. Your body should form a straight line from heels to head. Lower your chest towards the floor by bending your elbows, keeping them at about a 45-degree angle from your torso. Go as low as your chest nearly touches the ground, then push back up explosively until your arms are fully extended.
form_cues: Squeeze your glutes and brace your abs
Don't let your hips sag or pike up
Keep your neck neutral, eyes on the floor slightly ahead
safety_notes: If you experience wrist discomfort, use push-up handles or do them on your fists. Shoulder pain may indicate excessive elbow flare; keep elbows tucked to 45 degrees. Stop if you feel sharp pain in the shoulder joint.
